display.purpose: Landing hero headline — two-line stack, accent on payoff line.

headline.purpose: App page titles and section headings.

label.purpose: Chips, metadata, nav descriptions. Sentence case.

shadows.name: nav-dropdown
shadows.purpose: Desktop nav mega-menu float — functional only.

shadows.name: panel-inset-accent
shadows.purpose: Top edge highlight on app panels and selected asset tiles.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Hero sentinel-rise reveal and dialog entrance.

motion.name: hero-reveal-duration
motion.purpose: Headline lines, lead, and CTA stagger (0.12s–0.58s delays).

motion.name: mesh-blob-drift
motion.purpose: Landing hero mesh blob translate+scale loops.

motion.name: glow-border-spin
motion.purpose: QuoteCtaButton conic border rotation; static when prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Glow CTA — Get a quote
components.description: Landing header, hero, and mobile drawer primary conversion control.
components.html: Get a quote
components.css: .ds-glow-cta { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 26px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); padding: 1px; min-height: 44px; font-family: Geologica, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.045em; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 200ms ease-out, color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-glow-cta-border { position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: inherit; pointer-events: none; background: conic-gradient(from 0deg, rgba(92,169,255,0), rgba(92,169,255,0.85), rgba(92,169,255,0.25), rgba(92,169,255,0)); animation: ds-spin 4s linear infinite; } .ds-glow-cta-inner { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; min-height: 42px; width: 100%; padding: 12px 28px; border-radius: 25px; background: #000; } .ds-glow-cta:hover, .ds-glow-cta:focus-visible { color: #5ca9ff; outline: 2px solid #5ca9ff; outline-offset: 2px; } @keyframes ds-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-glow-cta-border { animation: none; } }

components.name: Primary Button (App)
components.description: In-app conversion — protect, connect, purchase flows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 44px; width: 100%; padding: 14px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: #47e299; color: #000; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5ca9ff; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Landing Hero Headline
components.description: Two-line centered display with accent on payoff line.
components.html: When the market dropsyou're covered.
components.css: .ds-hero-headline { margin: 0; text-align: center; font-family: Geologica, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2.75rem, 7vw, 5.5rem); font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.02; letter-spacing: -0.03em; text-wrap: balance; color: #fff; } .ds-hero-line { display: block; } .ds-hero-accent { color: #5ca9ff; }

components.name: Panel Card
components.description: Quote sections, wallet state, history rows.
components.html:
Example · trigger −2%

If price settles below $98,000, you get $1,000.
components.css: .ds-panel { padding: 24px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(77,162,255,0.3); background: #000; color: #fff; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(77,162,255,0.14); } .ds-panel-label { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 14px; color: #89919f; } .ds-panel-quote { margin: 0; font-family: Geologica, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 3.5vw, 1.75rem); line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 500; } .ds-panel-quote strong { color: #5ca9ff; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Status Chip — Paid
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-chip-paid { color: #7febb9; border-color: #063d23; background: transparent; }

components.name: App Tab Nav
components.html: <nav class="ds-tabs" aria-label="App menu"><button type="button" class="ds-tab ds-tab-active" aria-current="page">Cover</button><button type="button" class="ds-tab">History</button><button type="button" class="ds-tab">Wallet</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; gap: 4px; padding: 4px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); } .ds-tab { flex: 1; min-height: 40px; padding: 8px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #89919f; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #fff; } .ds-tab-active { background: #002e6a; color: #fff; } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5ca9ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
Sentinel is a calm expert in a volatile room: void-black Sui-native surfaces, one blue accent for emphasis, numbers you can audit. The anxious holder arrives before a CPI print — they need one premium, one button, one receipt.

The landing hero is a single full-viewport moment with animated mesh atmosphere and a glow CTA. The app shell keeps flat bordered panels, steel body copy, and mint-green pill buttons for conversion. Geologica headlines carry institutional weight; Manrope keeps disclosures readable.
keyCharacteristics: Void-black landing shell with animated mesh hero only
Glow CTA on landing; mint-green pill in app
Quote highlights in sui-blue-bright; body in steel
Flat app panels with blue-tinted borders
Status chips with text labels, not color alone

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Sui blue carries brand emphasis, hero atmosphere, and quote highlights. Mint green carries in-app conversion. Settlement mint and orange appear only for status semantics.

rules.name: The Mesh-Hero-Only Rule
rules.body: Animated multi-blob mesh gradients live on the landing hero only. App shell and lower landing sections stay flat and tonal.

rules.name: The Steel-on-Black Rule
rules.body: Body text uses steel muted. Hero lead uses white at ~84% opacity; strong emphasis bumps to full white.

rules.name: The Insurance-First Rule
rules.body: Headlines say you're covered and Get a quote. Protocol terms live in details expanders only.

rules.name: The Display Cap Rule
rules.body: Hero clamp max stays at 5.5rem. Letter-spacing floor −0.03em on display headings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No drop shadows on cards, app buttons, or the landing header bar. Emphasis via color, size, or border.

rules.name: The Motion-Enhancement Rule
rules.body: Hero text is fully visible before animation runs. prefers-reduced-motion disables mesh drift, glow spin, and reveal blur.

dos: Do lead every screen with insurance language — premium, coverage, trigger, payout, receipt.
Do use glow CTA on landing and mint-green pill in app with 44px minimum touch targets.
Do hide protocol implementation details in How is this priced? expanders.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion on mesh, glow spin, and staggered reveals.
Do pair status color with text labels on chips.
donts: Don't use prediction-market clone visuals — no Polymarket/Kalshi event tiles, YES/NO chips, crowd odds, or meme-market energy.
Don't use cream, sand, or warm off-white page backgrounds.
Don't stack numbered section markers or identical three-card grids across multiple sections.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe colored borders on cards, or decorative glassmorphism on content panels.
Don't extend animated mesh gradients beyond the landing hero background.
Don't show dUSDC, strike ladders, or vol-surface jargon above the fold.
Don't ship new surfaces in legacy wireframe style.
